extensionDescription.message: Uhlengahlengiso lobuchwephesha lokuchwetheza kwesi-Arabhu kuyo yonke iwebhusayithi. Ilungisa izithuba zoonobumba, ifaka iifonti ezintle zesi-Arabhu, kwaye ilungisa imiba yokunikezela ebangela ukuba isicatshulwa sesi-Arabhu sahlukane.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Nika amandla okanye ukhubaze isandisi-lungelo se-Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Isithuba soonobumba sisoloko sisetelwe ku-0 ukuthintela ukwahlukana koonobumba besi-Arabhu. Esi ngoyena nobangela uqhelekileyo wokunikezelwa kwesi-Arabhu okwaphukileyo kwiwebhu.

forceRTLDescription.message: Inyanzela isalathiso sasekunene-ukuya-ekhohlo kwiibhloko zesicatshulwa sesi-Arabhu. Nika amandla kwiziza apho isi-Arabhu sibonakala ngendlela engachanekanga ukusuka ekhohlo ukuya ekunene.

diacriticsDescription.message: Iphucula unikezelo lweempawu zezikhamiso zesi-Arabhu (tashkeel) ukuthintela ukusikwa ngaphezulu nangaphantsi komgca wesicatshulwa.

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Khetha ifonti eyahlukileyo yale sayithi kuphela, igqithise ukhetho lwakho lwefonti yehlabathi.

fontSourceNote.message: Iifonti zibonelelwa ziiGoogle Fonts. Ifuna uqhagamshelo lwe-intanethi ukulayisha okokuqala.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Izicelo zefonti zithunyelwa kwiiseva zikaGoogle. Jonga fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Isicatshulwa sesi-Arabhu sifunyenwe — izinto eziyi-$COUNT% zilungisiwe.

statusGlobalMode.message: Kusetyenziswa imowudi yehlabathi — iimpawu ze-lang/dir zifunyenwe.

statusNoArabic.message: Akukho sicatshulwa sesi-Arabhu sifunyenwe kweli phepha.
